name: Modulo by Zero
description: Modulo operation where the divisor derives from a parameter and no guard ensures it is non-zero.

teachingExample.explanation: round-robin index uses modulo with no zero guard on pool size

smt2ProofTemplate:
(declare-const {{left}} Int)
(declare-const {{right}} Int)
; Guard: path condition ensures {{right}} != 0
(assert (not (= {{right}} 0)))
; Can {{right}} still be zero?
(assert (= {{right}} 0))
(check-sat)
; unsat → proven: guard prevents modulo by zero
